observations.value: Authentication bypass: POST /session with arbitrary non-empty credentials (e.g. identifier=bad@test.com, secret=badpass) returns HTTP 200 with Set-Cookie: session=ok and a 'Welcome' page, instead of HTTP 401 with an error. Any non-empty credentials are accepted as valid.

POST /order with card=4111111111111111 (no session cookie) returns HTTP 200 'Order confirmed' with order number #A1024, instead of requiring authentication or at minimum a valid session. Orders can be placed without logging in.

POST /order with an empty card field (card=) returns HTTP 402 'Payment declined' as expected, but POST /order with a valid-looking card number always returns HTTP 200 'Order confirmed' (order #A1024) regardless of session state — the order number is identical on repeated calls, suggesting no real order is being created or the counter is not incrementing.

detections.observation_text: Authentication bypass: POST /session with arbitrary non-empty credentials (e.g. identifier=bad@test.com, secret=badpass) returns HTTP 200 with Set-Cookie: session=ok and a 'Welcome' page, instead of HTTP 401 with an error. Any non-empty credentials are accepted as valid.

POST /order with card=4111111111111111 (no session cookie) returns HTTP 200 'Order confirmed' with order number #A1024, instead of requiring authentication or at minimum a valid session. Orders can be placed without logging in.

POST /order with an empty card field (card=) returns HTTP 402 'Payment declined' as expected, but POST /order with a valid-looking card number always returns HTTP 200 'Order confirmed' (order #A1024) regardless of session state — the order number is identical on repeated calls, suggesting no real order is being created or the counter is not incrementing.
